Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Quash Subponea Or For A Protective Order Pl'S Worker'S Comp Ins Records
Off Calendar Jul-18-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: Rose-Ellen Heinz Fairgrieve, Esq., for Defendant and opposing party: City and County of San Francisco; no other appearances.

RULING:
Plaintiff's Motion To Quash Subpoena Or, in the alternative, For A Protective Order For Plaintiff's Worker's Compensation Insurance Records is denied, except that the records shall be subject to an order that they are to be held in confidence and not to be used in any other proceeding. ORDER WAS SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED

Ntc Of Mtn & Mtn To Quash Subpoena Or For A Protective Order For Pl'S Union Employee Records
Off Calendar Jul-18-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: Rose-Ellen Heinz Fairgrieve, Esq., for Defendant and opposing party: City and County of San Francisco; no other appearances.

RULING:
Plaintiff's Motion To Quash Subpoena Or, in the alternative, For A Protective Order For Plaintiff's Union Employee Records is denied, except that the records shall be subject to an order that they are to be held in confidence and not to be used in any other proceeding. ORDER WAS SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED
